$comment: Single source of truth for deploy-target folder names. Renaming gitmap-cli/ in the future ONLY requires editing this file. Loaders: run.ps1 (Get-DeployManifest), run.sh / install.sh (load_deploy_manifest), Go constants (constants_doctor.go GitMapCliSubdir reads from this at build via go:embed). Do NOT hardcode 'gitmap-cli' or 'gitmap' anywhere else.
